channel.title: SharePoint in Microsoft 365 on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in SharePoint in Microsoft 365 on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Microsoft Purview sensitivity label auditing in Azure AI Search
item.description:
Azure AI Search in public preview now emits audit events for Microsoft Purview sensitivity labels that are carried with indexed documents. This applies when the SharePoint in Microsoft 365 indexer is set to preserve and honor labels, and it records query-time filtering decisions and related label activity.

  • Source: Azure Updates
